$comment: Editor-curated alignment scores per bill. The matcher tags each bill with platform-position keywords automatically; this file is where a human editor (party officer or volunteer) records the actual alignment call. Without an entry here, a bill renders as 'under-review' on the dashboard. Schema: bill ID → { alignment, note, reviewedBy, reviewedAt }. alignment must be one of: aligned | mixed | opposed.

SR276.note: Directly mirrors the WTPPPA platform plank to ban securities trading by officials in office.

SB1313.note: Treats deployed PA service members as residents for hunting licenses — narrow but consistent with platform support for both Second Amendment access and protection of Pennsylvania soldiers.

SB507.note: Expands access to alternative health practitioners (midwives), aligned with the platform's medical freedom and alternative-medicine planks.

HB2151.note: Statewide standards for data center siting touch our zoning-reform plank — the platform calls for fewer land-use restrictions, but also for community input on developments. Needs further review of the bill text.
